text: Here, in a world crafted for thought, I am surrounded by the signs and symbols of knowledge and innovation. The glass-walled meeting room exudes a sense of anticipation for collaboration, yet stands empty, echoing with potential. Nearby, the bold wall of R+D (research and development) reminds me of humanity’s relentless drive to understand and improve our existence. I feel curious and contemplative, inspired by the silent invitation to both question and create.
